text: The academy halls smell of chalk and old ambition. I prefer smoke and spilled wine—truth hides better in taverns.
speaker: Stranger

text: The Rookery was named for birds that roost where stone meets sky. Secundus is the same: feathers, claws, and cold wind.
speaker: Stranger

text: If you seek Veneficturis, go with eyes open. If you seek survival, go with coins.
speaker: Stranger
